description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, and publish using the microsoft/dotnet:2-sdk image for the build and publish jobs, mono:5 for one test job, and microsoft/dotnet:1-sdk and microsoft/dotnet:2-sdk for the other test jobs, and set the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. In the build stage add a build job that caches the .packages directory, runs "dotnet restore --packages .packages" then "dotnet build --no-restore /p:TreatWarningsAsErrors=true", and stores artifacts .packages, */*/bin, and */*/obj for 1 day. In the test stage add three jobs: test:mono runs on mono:5 executing "msbuild /t:VSTest /p:VSTestNoBuild=true /p:TargetFramework=net451" and always uploads test/*/*.report artifacts; test:netcore1 runs on microsoft/dotnet:1-sdk executing "dotnet msbuild /t:VSTest /p:VSTestNoBuild=true /p:TargetFramework=netcoreapp1.1" with the same artifact settings; test:netcore2 runs on microsoft/dotnet:2-sdk executing "dotnet msbuild /t:VSTest /p:VSTestNoBuild=true /p:TargetFramework=netcoreapp2.0" and also uploads test/*/*.report artifacts. In the publish stage add a publish job that runs only on tags, depends on the build job, uses microsoft/dotnet:2-sdk, runs "dotnet msbuild /t:Pack /p:NoBuild=true /p:GitTag=$CI_COMMIT_TAG" then finds all *.nupkg files under src and pushes them to NuGet with "dotnet nuget push -s https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package -k $NUGET_API_KEY".
